assertions.title: Stock Daily Data Covers 5-Year Date Range

steps.action: Query pre-2021 stocks joined to stock daily MIN(trade_time)
steps.expected: No more than 10 rows with MIN(trade_time) > 2021-06-01 or NULL
steps.observed: 2376 rows exceeded threshold or had no stock daily data

evidence.queryResult: 2376 failing pre-2021 stocks out of 3988 pre-2021 listings; sample rows include 000004, 000006, 000007 with NULL min_trade_time

steps.action: Query pre-2021 stocks joined to stock daily row counts
steps.expected: No more than 10 rows with row_count < 1000
steps.observed: 2375 rows had fewer than 1000 daily rows

evidence.queryResult: 2375 failing pre-2021 stocks; many rows have 0 daily rows

assertions.title: Post-2021 IPO Stocks Backfilled from List Date

steps.action: Query post-2021 IPOs comparing list_date to stock daily MIN(trade_time)
steps.expected: No more than 10 rows with start date more than 30 days after list_date or NULL
steps.observed: 1168 post-2021 IPO stocks exceeded threshold or had no stock daily data

evidence.queryResult: 1168 failing post-2021 IPO stocks out of 1490; sample rows include 001201, 001202, 001205 with NULL min_trade_time

assertions.title: Expanded Stock Universe Fully Backfilled

steps.action: Query watchlist stocks missing any stock daily row before 2021-06-01 and cross-reference list_date
steps.expected: Only post-2021 IPOs appear, with no more than 10 pre-2021 watchlist stocks missing early data
steps.observed: 294 watchlist stocks lacked any row before 2021-06-01, including pre-2021 stock 000792 (list_date 19970904)

evidence.queryResult: 294 watchlist stocks missing early data; watchlist_total=1938, watchlist_with_kline=1935

assertions.issues: At least one pre-2021 watchlist stock is missing early data, so the result is not limited to post-2021 IPOs.

frictions.description: Contract queries had to be adapted to local schema because watchlist.ticker and klines.symbol_code store 6-digit symbols, while stock_basic.list_date is keyed by stock_basic.symbol rather than ts_code.
frictions.resolution: Validated schema with read-only joins and reran all four assertions using stock_basic.symbol joins.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 0 passed, 4 failed. Key failing counts: VAL-BACKFILL-001=2376, VAL-BACKFILL-002=2375, VAL-BACKFILL-021=1168, VAL-CROSS-002=294.
